title: anthurium certeguense
intro: Anthurium certeguense, also known as the 'False Bird of Paradise,' is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum. Native to the tropical forests of Colombia and Ecuador, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Anthurium certeguense include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Anthurium certeguense are often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health problems.
